name: S3 Bucket Allows Public Write Access
description: S3 bucket policy or ACL grants write permissions to anonymous users or all authenticated AWS users
conditions: policy.Statement ANY (Effect == 'Allow' AND Principal == '*' AND Action MATCHES 's3:(Put|Delete).*')
acl.grants ANY (grantee.uri CONTAINS 'AllUsers' AND permission IN ('WRITE', 'FULL_CONTROL'))
remediation: Remove public write permissions immediately. Enable Block Public Access settings. Review and restrict bucket policy. Enable versioning for recovery from malicious writes.
